ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "rad_flow" INTEGER /* Value of the radiation flow sensor */,
  "fpv_close" INTEGER /* Value of the FPV close sensor */,
  "fpv_open" INTEGER /* Value of the FPV open sensor */,
  "high" INTEGER /* Value of the high sensor */,
  "bypass" INTEGER /* Value of the bypass sensor */,
  "bpv_close" INTEGER /* Value of the BPV close sensor */,
  "bpv_open" INTEGER /* Value of the BPV open sensor */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, machine) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_state" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine state */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine or process */,
  "state" TEXT /* Classified state of the machine (e.g., normal, anomaly, warning) */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the state classification */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the state classification */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity of the state (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who reviewed the state */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_state_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_state_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine or process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the machine or process */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the machine */,
  "last_maintenance" INTEGER /* Last maintenance date */,
  "next_maintenance" INTEGER /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the machine (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" INTEGER /* Last calibration date */,
  "next_calibration" INTEGER /* Next scheduled calibration date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "rad_flow" INTEGER /* Value of the radiation flow sensor */,
  "fpv_close" INTEGER /* Value of the FPV close sensor */,
  "fpv_open" INTEGER /* Value of the FPV open sensor */,
  "high" INTEGER /* Value of the high sensor */,
  "bypass" INTEGER /* Value of the bypass sensor */,
  "bpv_close" INTEGER /* Value of the BPV close sensor */,
  "bpv_open" INTEGER /* Value of the BPV open sensor */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, machine) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" INTEGER /* Last login date and time */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
